# Chapter 13: Probability theory  (~100 pp)
- 13.1 Sample spaces and events (10)
- 13.2 Conditional probability, Bayes (15)
- 13.3 Random variables, expectation, variance (15)
- 13.4 Common distributions: discrete and continuous (15)
- 13.5 Joint distributions, independence, correlation (12)
- 13.6 Limit theorems: LLN, CLT (12)
- 13.7 Stochastic processes preview (10)
- 13.8 Failure section: independence assumed where there was none (11)

**Archetype**: uncertainty (formalised). **Project**: simulate a Markov chain; verify long-run behaviour against theory. **Exercises**: 40.
